description: Make me a better sales manager. Wouldn’t want to do my job without it!
author: Traci E.
pros: Track well keeps my sales staff honest about the traffic in our showroom. You can’t dispute the actual facts because it’s on camera. The data that Trackwell collects for me is so valuable. I use the reports every day.
cons: I sometimes have issues doing year to year comparisons on weekends.

description: The product and service have been great thus far
author: Mathew A.
pros: It is an invaluable tool in keeping track of the foot traffic in the store
cons: Sometimes the camera doesn't take pictures, but that's more due to our placement.

description: Colleagues share the opportunity board. But, must have a central computer if you are helping a colleague to go on break, or back up. Reading opportunities in a long list more challenging. I understand more training is also involved.
author: Debra R.
pros: As a CRM system it is easy to input information.
cons: Cluttered. How can I click on one record and have it expand. Small area to read. When I input a phone number to see if the customer has been here it does not always come up.

description: Great! Between the pictures and the reports it's user friendly.
author: Jessica B.
pros: How easy the program is to use. Just click on a picture and away you go.
cons: If this program integrated into profits it would be the best!

author: Eric P.
pros: Camera system is very accurate and helps us easily track customers coming in and out of the door. It is good that this integrates with our current CRM (PERQ). Also, using the cameras for surveillance in sensitive areas is helpful in having all cameras on the same account.
cons: We didn't find the CRM portion of the product to be as useful as the one we were currently using.

description: The problem is that Doorcounts was great; user friendly, easy to search for what you needed. Now that it is Trakwell we have so many problems we keep waiting to be resolved. Hopefully one day it with function better.
author: Diana G.
pros: Very helpful for the sales staff to know who is with which customers. Also to pull data to help coach the staff.
cons: Since it switched from Doorcounts to Trakwell there have been multiple problems we are still waiting to be resolved. 1. The calendar doesn't come up to select an appointment date, 2. We keep having customer information and history merge with one another making for poor customer service 3. I don't hear back from Trakwell for support. 4. It only auto populates US addresses. 5. If you edit a customer's information who purchase you still need to fill in potential value. 6. If you write long comments in potential sales, it makes it a challenge to scroll through your contact manager.

description: Support is second to none. They are responsive as are reps and trainer.
author: Susan C.
pros: Ease of use, accuracy and our ability to link several platforms for the best customer followup!
cons: Not much really. We've always had questions and issues dealt with quickly

description: pretty good. When we have issues they are responsive.
author: Brenda W.
pros: It does a pretty good job of tracking and qualifying traffic to help our store data.
cons: sometimes it auto excludes things that are not accurate, and can't override.

description: Enjoyed the product it has helped us be more efficient
author: JR L.
pros: Ease and convenience of reports in one place
cons: Picture quality not taking pictures. Hard to convert potential sales to sales without taking yourself out of rotation.

author: brian S.
pros: This program is easy to navigate , many options to review different aspects.
cons: The titles of each category seem a little redundant and not accurate to what they do. More simple listings to navigate would be helpful.

author: Jacob M.
pros: I don't use trakwell much, but as the IT person I do have to investigate issues with Trakwell or showroom cameras. I often need to contact the Trakwell customer support team, and have not once had a bad experience getting support. Reps are knowledgeable, patient and polite, and I have always been able to get ahold of someone moments after calling the support number.
cons: I wouldn't mind the ability to directly access the camera settings myself for troubleshooting, but customer support has always been able to resolve those issues quickly anyways.

description: It is great, and helps me a lot in every single project
author: Mahfam P.
pros: Details that show for every single client
cons: I wanted to share some feedback on the new AI system. While the recent updates have greatly improved its performance, some areas remain of concern. The accuracy remains inconsistent, occasionally mixing up items and misidentifying shadows as people in camera feeds, which can be confusing for the team. However, I appreciate the enhancements made to features and details recently.

author: Brendan B.
pros: The Action Calendar and Contact Manager are my main tools for following up with potential buyers. It makes it so easy to call, text, or email, and schedule how you will interact with the customers.
cons: Slightly glitchy Floorboard screen when it gets really busy,

author: Chelsey V.
pros: Trakwell helps my company track sales and traffic- reasons why people come through our doors.
cons: the doorbell! sometimes its startling to open the page and it chimes are you- usually when I least expect it !

author: Daniel P.
pros: Trackwell provides an easy to use "door count", with ability to link client photo with contact information.
cons: Trackwell does not function as a full fledged CRM, linking sales system with in the moment updates.

author: Peter A.
pros: The reports are great! They help us count traffic to make business decisions.
cons: The site is sometimes slow and it can take several minutes to download a report.

description: Great 5/5. I like the way data/users collaborate within trakwell.
author: Alex S.
pros: The ability to use CRM and customer tracking all in one.
cons: The up system has flaws, but no system is perfect.

author: Amy B.
pros: The picture capture is a valuable tool for our business.
cons: Dashboard functionality could be better.

description: We've been really happy with the results from Trakwell. It has been extremely helpful in helping us to retain and gain new customers.
author: Janice H.
pros: The ability to identify and track customers, learn buying habits and create lists to contact them later.
cons: Nothing, I have not had any issues with Trakwell worth mentioning.

author: Marianne M.
pros: Ease of use and portability. Ie web based system
cons: There is nothing I don’t like about trackwell
